sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13892" key="a)postrofi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπο-στροφία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,<sense id="n13892.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">she that turns away,</tr_> epith. of Aphrodite, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:9:16:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.16.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
